name: Cafe Au Vin
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Cold strong French roast coffee
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a blender cup and mix at high speed.
2. Pour into chilled wine glasses.
Nutritional analysis per serving: 70 calories; 0.006 grams total fat (0% of calories from fat); 0 milligrams cholesterol; 4.54 milligrams sodium.
